name: Hendrell Remus
subject: coming together
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemail [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemail]
Peter,
Here’s the deal. I’m committing right now to doing everything in my power to defeat Bill Lee and turn Tennessee Blue in 2022. I’m committing to putting in the work, but our team needs help raising the funds. The TNDP is still $4,700 away from our mid-month goal, and the clock runs out at midnight tomorrow.
Will you help? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemail]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemail [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemail]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemail [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemail]
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemail [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemail]

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Happy Valentine’s Day! ❤️
body:
Let's all share the love
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00171Ddv24wIYWP8VOVuAiOTcYmz-orEY6LnfN0A33CHQuFoKAkixEHIZTV7bBDW0QRfiPnrx8aXw1PC1ca7G-niO064mTzNpqHD34jf2Lrrb_ysE0zsm6PLYZepwLim1MqyZ5RRaAzXg0H60VeHp1a5cdhmL1GS7c3&c=3xLkU_Z1xwEWrKnmre1rBbY4EwjInCC3FMP2qrdEruLc0pQUHACv8A==&ch=lIuq8e7npjoPrFLeU9iF4Xf-i6iucqLmem47qYZ-06SCWOOK0Uc_VQ==)
---
| Friend,
Happy Valentine's Day!
Today is a day we can express love for family, friends, neighbors, and country. Today, let's look past the flaws and embrace those we love!
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00171Ddv24wIYWP8VOVuAiOTcYmz-orEY6LnfN0A33CHQuFoKAkixEHIZTV7bBDW0QRfiPnrx8aXw1PC1ca7G-niO064mTzNpqHD34jf2Lrrb_ysE0zsm6PLYZepwLim1MqyZ5RRaAzXg0H60VeHp1a5cdhmL1GS7c3&c=3xLkU_Z1xwEWrKnmre1rBbY4EwjInCC3FMP2qrdEruLc0pQUHACv8A==&ch=lIuq8e7npjoPrFLeU9iF4Xf-i6iucqLmem47qYZ-06SCWOOK0Uc_VQ==)
---
| I hope you have an incredible day surrounded by friends and loved ones. I know I am grateful to have my husband by my side and look forward to sharing this day with him.
Have a happy Valentine's Day!
---
|
---
| Kat Cammack

---
|

name: Jay Inslee
subject: President Biden's climate plan meets the moment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
For the first time in four years, I'm excited -- and hopeful.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/mPwjhRLGaXQj/NThFK1NUNjQzTllTSE43cFpnVW5Jcnd4RHdhMlhWeGtjK0NnSXFVZWRQbTZnOFVzUjlQM1c5Vkt3aUdSV0kxM2FFMC8xOGxXSlhsTXVlY2ZiT0ZVSzFCaWtpVUFvYjhROEZQUFFzRnAydDA9S0/ZzZBNWRXOUE3VmdGaThxRlNWOXo3dkVZWmFaYU52NXkrWVpNTXVXb2pxQT0S1) Friend, We're four weeks into the presidency of Joe Biden, but he's already taking action that will once again make the United States a climate leader at home and abroad. One of the very first actions President Biden took was rejoining the Paris Climate Agreement, once again committing to our allies that we'll work alongside them to end the climate crisis together, and reviewing harmful rollbacks of standards that keep our air, water, and communities clean and protected. Then a couple of weeks ago, he took executive action to create good-paying union jobs and an equitable clean energy future, build modern and sustainable infrastructure, restore scientific integrity and evidence-based policymaking across the federal government, and re-establish the President's Council of Advisors on Science and Technology. This is a full-scale mobilization of the federal government, which is exactly what we need to meet this moment. I've said for years that this is THE moment, OUR climate moment, when we can't afford to step back -- and President Biden's actions are exactly what's needed right now. What we're seeing from the Biden Administration is no accident. It's the result of many years of organizing and activism. From the movement you and I came together over the past few years to the many thousands of activists and organizers who dedicate their lives to this work, the drumbeat for progress has led to what we're seeing now. [**For the first time in four years, I 'm excited about the United States' shared commitment to fight the climate crisis: Will you join me in sharing the good news about President Biden's climate plan on Facebook right now?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/vW8jMVKYmWHY/NThFK1NUNjQzTllTSE43cFpnVW5Jcnd4RHdhMlhWeGtjK0NnSXFVZWRQbTZnOFVzUjlQM1c5Vkt3aUdSV0kxM2FFMC8xOGxXSlhsTXVlY2ZiT0ZVSzFCaWtpVUFvYjhROEZQUFFzRnAydDA9S0/) Very truly yours, Jay | [SHARE ON FACEBOOK](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/WeGZfaL3Edtw/NThFK1NUNjQzTllTSE43cFpnVW5Jcnd4RHdhMlhWeGtjK0NnSXFVZWRQbTZnOFVzUjlQM1c5Vkt3aUdSV0kxM2FFMC8xOGxXSlhsTXVlY2ZiT0ZVSzFCaWtpVUFvYjhROEZQUFFzRnAydDA9S0/)
---

subject: For your eyes only -- do not fwd

body:
I was forwarded this memo today and thought Top Patriots should see it immediately. Take a look.

I was forwarded this memo today and thought Top Patriots should see it immediately.

Conservative leaders are seriously worried that we won't have enough support to keep the Democrats from filling more seats in the House with politicians who move increasingly further to the Ultra-Left.

Take a look for yourself, fellow patriot.

\-- Taylor, NRCC Digital

*******Confidential Memo*******
Attn: House GOP Conservatives
Re: Aggressive Tactics from the Radical Left

The Radical Left has been aggressively campaigning to keep their majority by fueling their dark-money-machine with MILLIONS of dollars to keep their radical agenda alive.

**With only 5 seats needed to retake the House Majority, Republicans are in a prime position to oust Speaker Pelosi from her role** , and most Progressive Democrats know they could lose their biggest ally and source of power if that happens.

body:
I came to America as a young woman searching for opportunity.
****

. [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WPA2yEbu1-c59W9WlDNLMIiZrH1fMGQ3tVkYsMIJEYJG6CIKfZwIDEngKmPwwQEL9zshcuhWau0764HklKbELb5NfD7cYHorjqqEvuisx6SqeZFY6CyOX0CIyNC_cu4nxg_4jTgN3yQ-UMIovxco-M54rge8X_k4Rpo53fH3WRcxRxS16GL6QFsuCsHCxKWhA8PNq8JPLsTiD4aMLC1eqhGpYDiIuhSl51jljBfBjNshL7kH0mMP_70bR4iGswTdYcIvZNsHznv5IbnbxGrmBnCsOe8peL6vDvKSafYBwigtDtZvYEgNgE5vksOMrOc-K41nb3MzcK89Nm86CCWIiWph2tgRSHR1r3YHmYE80GP6dxJbX5__T4DkTFAAPB8kI8cGBqTir8KbefyaZcQVMM6kHB3duRsz&c=VHoEpsEm0kbuPUluTK4s2A_cJ9QpLlKhg6_aILnwnWS0ICMVz1OJIA==&ch=y4WyrVxG7FdrkI0rwUJigZD8ecbC53krOcYk04L_UVc8uNtagqJgOQ==)
**My story is simple:** I came to America as a young woman with my single-mother, searching for opportunity. Instead, I discovered a government failing the people who needed it most. I watched my mother be harassed by a government agency and her small-business fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill she didn't have the resources to fight.

**I knew then and there, I had to fight for what 's right on behalf of those who couldn't fight for themselves.** I ran for the California State Board of Equalization -- _the very agency that took advantage of my mother_ -- and won. Since then I have returned over $400 million to taxpayers, fought against higher taxes, and focused on fixing a broken tax system that is holding our families and businesses back.

In Washington, I will continue to fight for lower taxes so all Americans can keep more of their hard-earned dollars in their wallet. I will fight for quick, common sense reforms that put hardworking Americans first. I will fight to keep the American Dream alive for future generations -- so everyone has the chance to live their very own American Dream, just as I did.

[**But, right now, I need your help. Friend, can I count on you?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WPA2yEbu1-c59W9WlDNLMIiZrH1fMGQ3tVkYsMIJEYJG6CIKfZwIDLMhK04C41_XN9VYYEH55pFMgduKsIHhKgHQgdBEdNGBJpcSZsPkSgYcwxRZI0jPMpDff9BH0bluVf7vg0sn2Yj2hd8_aFkeuEDUEge8p3_XUXaubHZx1nM9Ti0IYC7LPu4JHNzf_YR1R4D8rJgjQhguMdIDciJNgQxaILUx8gyUi-T7FMon3tLGCTvavDUyRjzMhBr0PHngAiOw651ASViazUI4MSVGV2G3mYLPCy8Ydkv35___C17hkZlzm862W1USibReHTsnXvVG6afs7i5R7EbE4YUD0NlZlhRMGpUyEj7JxcvM4zs5eikbRtg7MdAR1zdpPTiBpoTLd-sfjf0eiYynLzSsZHUic1edYt7C&c=VHoEpsEm0kbuPUluTK4s2A_cJ9QpLlKhg6_aILnwnWS0ICMVz1OJIA==&ch=y4WyrVxG7FdrkI0rwUJigZD8ecbC53krOcYk04L_UVc8uNtagqJgOQ==)

The Democrats spent $11,000,000.00 to defeat us -- _spending more dark money against us than any other race in the nation!_ -- and outspent us 3:1. One week after Election Day, we defeated Pelosi's handpicked candidate in one of the closest races in the nation AND flipped a California seat from BLUE to RED, putting us that much closer to taking back the House for Republicans.

But we're in for the fight of our lives. Pelosi's candidate -- the very one we defeated only weeks ago -- is gunning for a rematch because Pelosi and the Democrats know the future of the House Majority hinges on this seat. It's a seat we just recently flipped from BLUE to RED and it remains a top target.

I'm proud of my story, and I'm proud to be one of the first Korean-American women in Congress. [**Can I count on you to help keep the American Dream alive for future generations?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WPA2yEbu1-c59W9WlDNLMIiZrH1fMGQ3tVkYsMIJEYJG6CIKfZwIDLMhK04C41_XN9VYYEH55pFMgduKsIHhKgHQgdBEdNGBJpcSZsPkSgYcwxRZI0jPMpDff9BH0bluVf7vg0sn2Yj2hd8_aFkeuEDUEge8p3_XUXaubHZx1nM9Ti0IYC7LPu4JHNzf_YR1R4D8rJgjQhguMdIDciJNgQxaILUx8gyUi-T7FMon3tLGCTvavDUyRjzMhBr0PHngAiOw651ASViazUI4MSVGV2G3mYLPCy8Ydkv35___C17hkZlzm862W1USibReHTsnXvVG6afs7i5R7EbE4YUD0NlZlhRMGpUyEj7JxcvM4zs5eikbRtg7MdAR1zdpPTiBpoTLd-sfjf0eiYynLzSsZHUic1edYt7C&c=VHoEpsEm0kbuPUluTK4s2A_cJ9QpLlKhg6_aILnwnWS0ICMVz1OJIA==&ch=y4WyrVxG7FdrkI0rwUJigZD8ecbC53krOcYk04L_UVc8uNtagqJgOQ==) We need your help to fight against Pelosi's deep pockets and the Democrats' bottomless campaign war chests. It's the only way to defend this seat from the Far Left.

We might be facing one of the toughest, closest races in the nation, but with the support of grassroots conservatives like you, Friend, I know we can win again.

Thank you,

Michelle Steel

Friend, This is Congressman Ronny Jackson. I'm President Trump's former White House Physician, and I currently represent Texas' 13th Congressional District -- the most AMERICA-FIRST district in the Country. President Trump worked day and night to protect working-class Americans for FOUR YEARS. **Now, the Radical Left is determined to RUIN his legacy.** We simply cannot allow the far-left to get away with witch hunt after witch hunt against a FORMER President. **That 's why I've just ACTIVATED a 3X MATCH on every donation that's given BEFORE MIDNIGHT. ** [_**Chip-in and help me DEFEND President Trump 's successes and the AMERICA-FIRST agenda >>> **_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001apaXT3FmVEQf07wUUf2nAsUu7BhUH7zcjppXmD9sUqSPjAGb6H2lmhk0ioswD60bEGQWd3HGOVr_3iO7ZR7rGa-PvYxXV0GJpIToMCqXoM8HMZH7wxd5qhphBVZU5N1_bQMjRp3I1OIcqKi2yoAo46cb6ej0XZyQWOEVy8dTntaZ_Vpn96i3hT0lsRiXDWqRZ6OtYp_E6qGorNoHZSL_pIGkRBgNbhsKPTCcLPf0s0dJSzKUd_AYREYLJtujv1GTp-BLirxxfC6-y04PgBkTCJIUYHyn1J_LgCZvwrdnWYAuSRYh07yiNXokR-CZBikaFnJWJFWZhMS-1INHw_vgOFprQ34FPHtHM7M_EvaRVGfeUtOnWfEnbzeehWdpjt16Kx6bQK1ZFylovFpsZ76sLj03Gst0qxCFqR7r8c8fZFX9mNGt33FdHAs9ZV6O6y7-iB-0P-60f58YXHIyKMwA0nEL4xMIxForuGoFvlZRdm9wnQuaoQUMgw==&c=ZxC0jfIgay0NcaoN61KzO0ydyaGtgqVrUf-zgbs51hfRxt3bCWpMHQ==&ch=_CWTG9m1TJIqlE05hXEnJPFU-8hC0dt1FDAlnIzzNeE9PKp5inOFpA==) The America-First agenda needs _**STRONG**_ leaders in Congress, and that's exactly what I intend to be, Friend. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.
